_comment: Maps a Common Worship Sunday Gospel reference to the depicted subject(s) a sacred-art search should use, so ordinary Sundays get real scene/parable art rather than matching the occasion words (e.g. 'Trinity' → church buildings). Keyed by the exact gospel reference string from lectionary-coe.json. Covers the active window; unknown refs fall back to season/occasion search. Extend as new music lists are processed.

Matthew 9.9-13,18-26: Christ healing the woman with an issue of blood
Matthew 9.35 - 10.8 [9-23]: Christ sending out the twelve apostles
Matthew 11.16-19,25-30: Come unto me all ye that labour
Matthew 13.24-30,36-43: Parable of the Wheat and the Tares
